Roettlera petiolaris, also known as Anisomeles petiolaris, is a flowering plant native to Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Anisomeles petiolaris include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
